scripts.dream: node --import tsx scripts/run-safe-workspace.ts --command "node --import tsx src/cli.ts run"
scripts.dream:honcho: node --import tsx scripts/run-safe-workspace.ts --command "DREAM_BACKEND_ID=backend.honcho.memory node --import tsx src/cli.ts run"
scripts.dream:honcho-ingest-signal: node --import tsx scripts/run-safe-workspace.ts --command "DREAM_STAGE_ORDER=slot.orientation,slot.signal,slot.documentation,slot.skills,slot.governance,slot.observability DREAM_STAGE_IMPLEMENTATIONS=slot.signal=impl.signal.local-honcho-ingest node --import tsx src/cli.ts run"
scripts.dream:honcho-ingest-raw: node --import tsx scripts/run-safe-workspace.ts --command "DREAM_STAGE_ORDER=slot.orientation,slot.signal,slot.documentation,slot.skills,slot.governance,slot.observability DREAM_STAGE_IMPLEMENTATIONS=slot.signal=impl.signal.honcho-raw node --import tsx src/cli.ts run"
